title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Execution Trace: Design Defense
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa design defense increment in a defended multi-structure dispatch system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend alternatives, limitations, failure recovery, and measured tradeoffs to reviewers.
Test realistic, boundary, and adversarial workloads against analytical predictions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
